title: MAINTAINER: dispatch_payload() does per-message chain parsing, coupled to serde_json behavior
description: In dispatcher.rs lines 38-78, dispatch_payload() deserializes the payload directly. The function has three separate deserialization paths: (1) ClearMessage serde_json::from_slice, (2) PaymentAction::Request match, (3) check for Ack/Profile. If the serde tag changes in core/messages.rs, this code silently breaks. There's no type-level coupling—no newtype or validator preventing a misnamed tag from propagating through the system. In 6 months, if a new ClearMessage variant lands and forgot to handle it here, the event will be None and users see no message, no error. Fix: add doc comment documenting all ClearMessage variants and which ones produce events, plus a unit test that would fail if a new variant isn't handled.
